data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Secure browser lockdown', but the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or checks that confirm this functionality. While the linked use case mentions that the secure browser launches and blocks other applications, there is no direct evidence or specific endpoints provided to verify that this requirement is implemented and functioning as expected. This indicates a gap in the requirement coverage for the secure browser lockdown feature.
gaps: No evidence or API checks confirming the implementation of secure browser lockdown.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
